# PERF-143-comment positive: real HandleFunc without TimeoutHandler still fires
lang: go
file: PERF-143-comment-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

func slowHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	for _, c := range []byte("data") {
		_ = c
	}
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}

func Init() {
	http.HandleFunc("/slow", slowHandler)
}
